creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am getting this after applying the patches from bug #228525

Found ninja-1.8.2 at /usr/local/bin/ninja
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: build          >============================
===>  Building for zathura-pdf-mupdf-0.3.3
ninja: error: unknown target 'OPENSSL_INC=-I'
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/zathura-pdf-mupdf
